what_it_does: Automatically receives Ringover call data via webhook, filters it, and logs it with proper tagging into campaign-specific Google Sheets organized by month.
pain_it_solves: Eliminates manual entry and classification of call center data from Ringover into campaign tracking spreadsheets.
outcome: Call centers get automatic, organized campaign tracking with running totals that update in real-time as calls happen.
opener_hook_draft: Manually logging call center data into spreadsheets kills productivity and creates tracking chaos.
bespoke_opener_full: Manually logging call center data into spreadsheets kills productivity and creates tracking chaos. This is how our Ringover Webhook Listener gives you automatic, organized campaign tracking with real-time updates. In the next 90 seconds, I'll show you exactly how it works.
